browser_automation.description: Current-tab ChatGPT response reader. It reuses the authenticated browser session, opens a conversation route, and extracts the latest stabilized turn set.

sequences.description: Open thread -> wait for latest assistant turn to finish streaming -> return latest response and metadata.
sequences.name: chatgpt_get_response

steps.name: Open the target ChatGPT conversation in the current tab
Give the thread shell another moment
Wait for the ChatGPT thread surface
Return the latest assistant response and compact thread metadata

description: Open an existing ChatGPT conversation by chat id, wait for the latest assistant response to stabilize, and return it with compact thread metadata.

help.summary: Open an existing ChatGPT conversation by chat id, wait for the latest assistant response to stabilize, and return it with compact thread metadata.

name: ChatGPT: Get Latest Response
